title: add atmos-only target amip run

body: This PR adds reporting of walltime per timestep. Maybe this will help us with comparing apples-to-apples between configurations until we resolve remaining timestep questions.
title: Report walltime_per_timestep

body: Closes #2510. @dennisYatunin, I think you meant to include `q_liq`/`q_ice` to be non-passive tracers, as I believe they would play a role in the dynamics for non-equilibrium cases, so I left those where they are. I didn't see any other tracers that needed to be moved in `update_implicit_equation_jacobian!`, but maybe @dennisYatunin can double check my work.
title: Make tracer vert adv always explicit
